description: White House bar chart on a white background showing wage figures under Biden and under Trump. The serif title reads 'Biden Real Wage Losses & Trump Real Wage Gains for Typical Worker' (with 'Real Wage Gains' in italic). A two-item legend uses navy for 'Biden Decline in Real Wages (Total)' and red for 'Trump Real Wage Increases (1-Year, Annualized)'. The y-axis 'Real wage change ($)' runs from -$4,000 to +$4,000. One downward navy bar at left, labeled 'All Pvt. Sector', shows '-$2,919'. To its right, four upward red bars: 'All Pvt. Sector' +$1,048, 'Factory Worker' +$1,300, 'Construction' +$1,826, and 'Mining' +$3,336. Beneath the bars are two grouping labels: a grey 'BIDEN LOSSES' bracket under the navy bar and a pink 'TRUMP GAINS' bracket under the red bars. A dark navy footer bar carries 'THE WHITE HOUSE / WASHINGTON'. This is the second of two chart images in the same tweet.
notable_text: Biden Real Wage Losses & Trump Real Wage Gains for Typical Worker. -$2,919 (All Pvt. Sector). $1,048; $1,300; $1,826; $3,336. BIDEN LOSSES. TRUMP GAINS. THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON
